name: Sequential Thinking - Codex
description: MCP template to drive step-by-step reasoning and code edits using OpenAI Codex-style assistants.

steps.title: Understand context
steps.instruction: Read the repo context and the user's intent. Return a short summary and explicit assumptions.

steps.title: Decompose task
steps.instruction: Break the task into small implementation steps. Number them and mark dependencies.

steps.title: Implement step
steps.instruction: For the chosen step, output a unified diff or exact file contents to create/modify. Keep explanations short.

steps.title: Test and check
steps.instruction: Describe test commands or checks to validate the change; include expected outputs.
